name: team series success rate from plays
description: Test case for team series success rate from plays
expected_query: with "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279" as (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN series_result IN ('FIRST_DOWN', 'TOUCHDOWN') THEN CONCAT(esbid, '_', series_seq) END) as team_series_conversion_rate_from_plays_numerator, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN series_result NOT IN ('QB_KNEEL', 'END_OF_HALF') THEN CONCAT(esbid, '_', series_seq) END) as team_series_conversion_rate_from_plays_denominator from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by "nfl_plays"."off"), "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats" as (select "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279"."nfl_team", sum(t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279.team_series_conversion_rate_from_plays_numerator) / sum(t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279.team_series_conversion_rate_from_plays_denominator) as team_series_conversion_rate_from_plays from "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279" group by "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279"."nfl_team") select "player"."pid", "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats"."team_series_conversion_rate_from_plays" AS "team_series_conversion_rate_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats" on "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats"."nfl_team" = "player"."current_nfl_team" group by "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats"."team_series_conversion_rate_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
